title: Foo Bar ClickHouse Historical Backfill
description: Fix a broken historical backfill pipeline. The target table has incorrect partition or order keys that cause slow inserts and failed backfills for historical date ranges.

tasks.description: Repair the target table layout and backfill process so historical data loads correctly and efficiently.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with a staging table of historical events and a target table with suboptimal layout. Backfill fails or is extremely slow.
